zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey de Marisco Justiciar of Ireland於1173年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 利默里克時，他的父親Jordan de Marisco23歲，母親Idonea Comyn25歲。他於大約1212年與Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他在愛爾蘭被列為justiciar of ireland。他去世於1245年在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年72歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 利默里克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey de Marisco Justiciar of Ireland于1173年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 利默里克时，他的父亲Jordan de Marisco23岁，母亲Idonea Comyn25岁。他于大约1212年与Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他在爱尔兰被列为justiciar of ireland。他去世于1245年在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年72岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 利默里克。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marisco
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Nicola, Canio, Dante, Dario, Domenic, Giacinto, Gino, Guido, Italo, Marcello, Romolo.
Italian (southern): topographic name from the Salentine dialect word marascu ‘mullein’ (from Latin verbascum).

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey de Marisco Justiciar of Ireland was born in 1173, in County Limerick, Ireland, his father, Jordan de Marisco, was 23 and his mother, Idonea Comyn, was 25. He married Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly about 1212. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as justiciar of ireland in Ireland. He died in 1245, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 72, and was buried in County Limerick, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey de Marisco Justiciar of Ireland est né en 1173, à County Limerick, Irlande, son père, Jordan de Marisco, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Idonea Comyn, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly environ 1212. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est justiciar of ireland à Irlande. Il est décédé en 1245, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à County Limerick, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey de Marisco Justiciar of Ireland 1173 in County Limerick, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jordan de Marisco 23 und seine Mutter Idonea Comyn 25. Er hat um 1212 Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als justiciar of ireland in Irland aufgeführt. Er starb 1245 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in County Limerick, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Marisco Justiciar of Ireland è nato il nel 1173 nel County Limerick, Irlanda, il suo padre, Jordan de Marisco, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Idonea Comyn, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly circa 1212. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come justiciar of ireland nel Irlanda. Morì nel 1245, nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a County Limerick, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Marisco Justiciar of Irelandが1173年にアイルランドコウントイ リメリックで生まれた時，父Jordan de Mariscoは23歳，母Idonea Comynは25歳であった。約1212年にEve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offalyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。アイルランドでの職業はjusticiar of irelandと記録されている。彼は1245年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで72歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ リメリックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Marisco Justiciar of Ireland(이)가 1173년 아일랜드 카운티 라임릭에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jordan de Marisco(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Idonea Comyn(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1212년 Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 아일랜드에서 justiciar of ireland이었다. 그는 1245년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 라임릭에 묻혔다.

mn.Windsor, Berkshire, England: Windsor, Bearrucscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Marisco Justiciar of Ireland nasceu em 1173, em County Limerick, Irlanda, seu pai, Jordan de Marisco, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Idonea Comyn, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly aproximadamente 1212. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como justiciar of ireland em Irlanda. Ele faleceu em 1245, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em County Limerick, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey de Marisco Justiciar of Ireland родился в 1173 г. в местности коунти лимирикк, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Jordan de Marisco было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Idonea Comyn, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly около 1212 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии justiciar of ireland в местности Ирландия. Он умер в 1245 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности коунти лимирикк, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey de Marisco Justiciar of Ireland nació en 1173, en County Limerick, Irlanda, su papá, Jordan de Marisco, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Idonea Comyn, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly aproximadamente 1212. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era justiciar of ireland en Irlanda. Murió en 1245, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en County Limerick, Irlanda.
